case_title: MECHAM RICHARD W.: OWNER OF MISSION DENTAL LAB'Y VS RAGADIO ANTONIO C. DR., JR. D.D.S.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $774.19 FILED BY MECHAM RICHARD W.: OWNER OF MISSION DENTAL LAB'Y AS TO DEFENDANT RAGADIO ANTONIO C. DR., JR. D.D.S. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-27-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED RECEIPT TO ANTONIO RAGADIO RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MECHAM RICHARD W.: OWNER OF MISSION DENTAL LAB'Y RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAGADIO ANTONIO C. DR., JR. D.D.S. $774.19 PRINCIPAL, $12.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $786.98 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT RAGADIO ANTONIO C. DR., JR. D.D.S.
